title: Paradise Mod
description: A mod that makes many improvements to Minecraft and adds lots of new content
body:
![](https://www.paradisemod.net/logo.png)

![](https://www.paradisemod.net/front.png)

A mod that makes many improvements to Minecraft and adds lots of new content like new trees, wood types, 3 brand new dimensions to explore, and many more features! Also, the creation of this mod was inspired by mods like *Oh The Biomes You'll Go!*, *Quark*, and *Charm*.

## Minecraft 1.18.2+: This mod requires TerraBlender! ([Download it here](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender))

## Can I use this mod in a modpack?

Of course! Use it in any modpack of your choosing!

[website](https://www.paradisemod.net/)
